message:
refactor(pt-core): optimize deep_scan to cache user resolution and boot_id

- Introduce `UserCache` to parse `/etc/passwd` once instead of per-process (O(1) vs O(N) disk reads)
- Read system `boot_id` once in `deep_scan` instead of per-process
- Update `scan_process` signature to accept cached data
- Remove inefficient `resolve_username` helper
- Update tests to use `UserCache` and inject `boot_id`
